deals.deal: Free Medium Fries every Friday with $1+ app purchase
deals.desc: Order anything for $1 or more on the McDonald's app every Friday to score free medium fries — a year-round ongoing deal.

deals.deal: $9.99 Any Pizza, Any Crust, Up to 7 Toppings through July 26
deals.desc: Order online or in-app to get any large Domino's pizza with any crust — including Parmesan Stuffed Crust — and up to 7 toppings for $9.99.

deals.deal: BOGO Whopper via DoorDash this week (July 2–8)
deals.desc: DashPass members can snag a buy-one-get-one Whopper at Burger King through DoorDash during Watch Party Week July 2–8.
Mix and match two items for $5 or three items for $7 from a select menu including Whopper Jr., Original Chicken Sandwich, fries, and drinks.

deals.deal: BOGO Create Your Own Large Pizza via DoorDash (July 2–8)
deals.desc: DashPass members can get a buy-one-get-one deal on Create Your Own large pizzas at Pizza Hut during Watch Party Week.

deals.deal: Any Large Pizza Up to 3 Toppings for $10
deals.desc: Score any large Pizza Hut pizza with up to three toppings for $10, available online, in-app, or in store.

deals.deal: $1 off Cantina Chicken Rolled Quesadilla for new rewards sign-ups
deals.desc: New Taco Bell Rewards members receive an offer for $1 off a Cantina Chicken Rolled Quesadilla valid through July 22, 2026.

deals.deal: 3 Snack Tacos for $2.49 every Tuesday 3–11 PM
deals.desc: Every Tuesday from 3 PM to 11 PM, get three Snack Tacos starting at just $2.49 at participating Taco Bell locations.

deals.deal: BOGO Any Size Side for Rewards Members (through July 5)
deals.desc: Arby's Rewards members can score a buy-one-get-one deal on any size side when ordering online, in-app, or in-store — limit once per week.
For a limited time, get any Arby's Slider for $1.99 each at participating locations nationwide.

deals.deal: Eagle Cup $10.99 + Free Medium Beverage + 30 Days of $3 Drinks
deals.desc: Buy the limited-edition Eagle Cup for $10.99, get a free medium beverage instantly, plus a code for $3 medium Dunkin' Zero or Refresher daily for 30 days.

deals.deal: BOGO Entree via PGA TOUR Hot Streak Promotion
deals.desc: Watch the PGA TOUR on X or Instagram for a keyword drop, text it to 888222, and claim a BOGO entree code — up to 50 drops through Dec. 31, 2026.

deals.deal: Buy One Whole Sandwich/Salad/Soup, Get Another for $5
deals.desc: For a limited time, buy any whole sandwich, salad, Market Bowl, or bowl of soup and get a second item for just $5 at Panera Bread.

deals.deal: Secret Recipe Vault: Free Food via KFC Rewards Points
deals.desc: KFC Rewards members earn 10 points per eligible dollar on digital orders and redeem them for rotating free items like nuggets, chicken sandwiches, or sides in the Secret Recipe Vault.
Sonic launched a new America $2.50 Menu celebrating the U.S. 250th anniversary, featuring select items at just $2.50.

deals.deal: Half-Price Drinks & Slushes 2–4 PM daily with app order-ahead
deals.desc: Every day from 2–4 PM (2–5 PM at some locations), order ahead on the Sonic app to get half-price drinks and slushes.

deals.deal: Free FIFA World Cup Collectible Cup with $7+ App Purchase
deals.desc: Through the McDonald's app, get a free limited-edition FIFA World Cup collectible cup with any $7 minimum purchase during the tournament.

deals.deal: Pie Rewards: Free Medium 2-Topping Pizza at 60 Points
deals.desc: Join Domino's Pie Rewards and earn 10 points per $5 order — redeem 60 points for a free medium 2-topping pizza, or just 20 points for a free drink or bread bites.
